title: 3 Cand Enters
lyrics: Deacons move to door.  They face the door.  SD is on the right.  Step apart.  Turn towards each other.  SD changes wand.
IG brings in candidate, says his line, then play music

title: 4 SMIB
cue: At the end of the prayer
lyrics: Prayer is given, then this.

title: 5.1 Prepared to JW
file: audio/EA/5.1 after WM says to be made a Freemason.mp3
cue: Play after WM says - to be made a Freemason.
lyrics: The procession has halted just past the NW corner
The WM has a line, then this

title: 5.2 JW to SW
file: audio/EA/5.2 after JW says pass free and of GR.mp3
lyrics: The JW be standing and will shake the hand of the Cand

title: 6 After Questions
cue: After the SW instructs the JD
lyrics: Nothing is played after the shakes the hand of the Cand
This plays as the Cand is escorted from the SW

title: 7 Kneel
lyrics: As the wands go up, this plays

title: 8 Keep Thy
file: audio/EA/8 Keep Thy. after WM says on the VSL.mp3
cue: The WM finishes saying - the VSL
lyrics: This is at the end of the obligation

title: 9 Light
file: audio/EA/9 Light. after WM says restored to the C.mp3
cue: After the WM tells the SD to restore..
lyrics: And God Said, Let There Be Light.  And. There. Was. Light

title: 10 After Oblig
file: audio/EA/10 after WM says brother among masons.mp3
lyrics: The Cand will do a lap of the lodge as this plays

title: 11.1 Secrets to JW
cue: As the brother who gave the secrets returns to his chair
lyrics: The Cand should move to the JW as this plays

title: 11.2 JW tO SW
file: audio/EA/11.2 after JW says pass B.mp3

title: 12 After Badge Extension
cue: After the badge extension is delivered
lyrics: The Cand should stay in place during this

title: 13 Charity
file: audio/EA/13 after JW reports he would give freely.mp3
cue: After the JD has reported - or he would give freely.
lyrics: The JD will wait until this ode finishes before handing things back to the secretary table

title: 14 After NE Charge
file: audio/EA/14 after NE charge is done.mp3
cue: As the brother who delivered the NE charge returns to his seat

title: 15.1 After WTs
file: audio/EA/15.1 after WT charge is finished.mp3
cue: As the brother who delivered the WTs charge returns to his seat

title: 15.2 Before Final
file: audio/EA/15.2 after WM finishes and before Final.mp3
cue: After the Cand has been addressed by the WM
lyrics: This plays as the Cand moves back up to the West
The WM has just said - I now direct your attention to an ancient charge, etc

title: 16.1 After Final
file: audio/EA/16.1 as Cand comes up to East.mp3
cue: After the WM has congratulated the Cand
lyrics: The Final will finish and that brother will sit
Then the WM will deliver a line to the Cand
This plays as the Cand is escorted back to the east

title: 16.2 to Saluting Base
file: audio/EA/16.2 as Cand goes back to West.mp3
cue: After the WM/Chap has finished addressing the Cand
lyrics: This plays as the Cand is escorted from the WM back to the west

title: 16.3 Leaving Lodge Room
cue: After instruction by the JD, and the Cand is leaving
lyrics: Plays as the Cand goes towards the door
